# ADR-0004: Documentation is written in American English

## Status

Accepted — 2026-05-18

## Context

Docs drifted between British and American spellings depending on the author, and
reviewers spent time flagging spelling instead of substance.

## Decision

All project documentation uses American English spelling. The spell-check
dictionary in the docs toolchain is pinned to that locale.

## Consequences

Spelling review is mechanical. Contributors used to other conventions rely on the
toolchain rather than memory.
